item.description:
Visual Improvements

  • Advanced Corner & Border Customization: You now have much more control over the look of your menu bar — customize the roundness and borders corner by corner to match your style.
  • Improved Vibrant Theme: The default profiles for the Vibrant appearance have been refined so the outlines look great right out of the box.
  • Cleaner Settings UI: We've simplified the visual customization panel by removing redundant options, making it much easier to personalize the app.

Performance & Experience

  • Smarter Temporary Bar Display: The feature that temporarily reveals your menu bar has been significantly reworked — it now responds better to your clicks and plays more nicely with other apps running on your Mac.
  • Improved Reliability: When Glow repositions menu bar items on screen, it now restores them to their original position with greater precision and consistency, even when other apps cause unexpected lag or brief freezes.
  • Lower Resource Usage: Glow is now smarter about caching data in the background (such as your monitor layout and IDs), resulting in faster rendering and less CPU overhead.

Under the Hood

  • Internal Cleanup: We've done a thorough cleanup to remove unnecessary internal noise from the app's code, making Glow run quieter and more efficiently behind the scenes.
